commands.review_summary:
The PR updates agent exec script preflight to recursively unwrap command carriers and adds tests for readable sudo/env/shell-wrapped Python and Node scripts.

PR surface: Source +78, Tests +79. Total +157 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: on PR head, recursive extraction can find a target under sudo/env plus a shell wrapper, but if every candidate script is missing, outside workdir, or unreadable, checkedAnyScript remains false and the fallback is not carrier-aware. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the remaining security-boundary repair plus fail-closed compatibility choice need maintainer-approved proof.

target.title: FAD-1481 Harden exec script preflight carrier unwrapping
target.body:
## Summary
- Harden exec script preflight so interpreter targets are resolved through nested command carriers such as `sudo`, `env`, and shell wrappers.
- Fail closed when a detected complex interpreter invocation cannot actually validate any in-workdir script file.
- Add regression coverage for sudo/env option-value forms, env assignments, clustered shell wrappers, nested carriers, and path-qualified carriers.

## Verification
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/bash-tools.exec.script-preflight.test.ts --reporter=verbose` — 59 passed, 4 skipped

## Review / merge gate
- Tracking ticket: FAD-1481
- Independent signed review required before merge. Do not merge until approved by a non-costaff reviewer.
target.author: spencer2211
